programme.title: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Dua bersaudara, satu agen FBI dan yang lainnya pencuci uang internasional, mengesampingkan perbedaan mereka dan bersatu untuk menyelamatkan keluarga mereka dengan mengejar ekstraksi berbahaya jauh di dalam wilayah gembong.

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: Freetown
programme.desc: Sekelompok misionaris asli Liberia melakukan perjalanan lintas negara yang penuh keputusasaan melalui negara mereka yang dilanda perang untuk menyelamatkan salah satu dari mereka.

programme.title: Deadly Vendeta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; tak lama kemudian, terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: Empat siswa baru menghadapi berbagai tantangan masa remaja di pesta SMA pertama mereka.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: The Little Ghost
programme.desc: Si Hantu Kecil tinggal di kastil yang menghadap ke kota kecil dan terbangun tepat satu jam setelah jam menunjukkan tengah malam. Ikuti petualangannya untuk melihat matahari terbit pertamanya!

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: Owls & Mice
programme.desc: Meral (8) baru saja pindah ke sebuah kota baru. Ia berusaha mendapatkan teman di sekolah barunya sebelum perkemahan musim gugur sekolah dimulai, tetapi ternyata hal itu lebih sulit dari yang dibayangkannya. Di rumah, ia berteman dengan seekor tikus kecil yang tinggal di kamar barunya, yang ia beri nama Peepeep. Takut orang tuanya akan membunuh Peepeep saat ia pergi, Meral diam-diam membawanya ikut serta. Berkat tikus kecil itu, Meral mendapatkan beberapa teman baru yang tak terduga. Ketika seekor burung hantu menangkap tikus kecil tersebut, Meral menyalahkan teman-teman barunya. Baru setelah mereka bersama-sama pergi ke alam liar untuk mencari muntahan burung hantu yang berisi tulang-belulang Peepeep, Meral akhirnya memahami arti sebenarnya dari persahabatan. OWLS & MICE adalah sekuel dari FROGS & TOADS yang sukses dan memenangkan berbagai penghargaan, dari penulis dan sutradara yang sama, Simone van Dusseldorp.

programme.title: House Of Wonder

programme.title: Pokémon: The Rise Of Darkrai
programme.desc: Sebuah kota yang damai dilanda kekacauan ketika dua Pokémon kuat, Dialga dan Palkia, bertemu dan bertarung, mendistorsi dimensi ruang dan waktu. Satu-satunya harapan datang dari Darkrai, Pokémon misterius yang dikucilkan oleh penduduk kota.

programme.title: Popular Theory
programme.desc: Erwin, seorang gadis jenius, adalah siswa termuda di sekolah menengah; sayangnya, ia kesulitan mengatasi isolasi sosial. Ketika ia bertemu dengan sesama ahli sains, Winston, mereka bekerja sama untuk menciptakan zat kimia yang mengubah hierarki sekolah selamanya.

programme.title: Pokémon: Lucario & Mystery...

programme.title: House Of Wonder

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Infinitum Subject Unknown
programme.desc: Sebuah film eksperimental dibuat hanya dengan satu anggota kru. Jane terjebak di alam semesta paralel dan dipaksa untuk menemukan cara untuk mengubah realitasnya sebelum terlambat.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: God's Country
programme.desc: Ketika seorang profesor perguruan tinggi berhadapan dengan dua pemburu yang dia tangkap sedang memasuki propertinya tanpa izin, dia terlibat dalam pertarungan kemauan yang semakin sengit dengan konsekuensi yang sangat dahsyat.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: The Vanishing Of Sidney Hall
programme.desc: Sidney Hall menemukan kesuksesan yang tidak disengaja dan cinta yang tak terduga di usia dini, lalu menghilang tanpa jejak.

programme.title: Beyond Existence
programme.desc: Ellen, seorang agen pemerintah mengikuti perintah untuk mencari dan menghancurkan seorang profesor yang telah memperdagangkan informasi pemerintah ke wilayah asing. Namun, dalam sebuah putaran takdir, nyawa sang Profesor selamat, dan pasangan yang tidak mungkin bertemu ini menemukan diri mereka dalam perjalanan darat melalui lanskap tandus Inggris.

programme.title: What A Conductor Actually...
programme.desc: Apa sebenarnya tugas seorang konduktor saat memimpin sebuah orkestra? Program dokumenter singkat ini mengungkap peran penting seorang konduktor dalam menerjemahkan visi komposer menjadi pertunjukan yang hidup.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will...

programme.desc: Dua sahabat dari latar belakang berbeda berjuang hidup bersama hingga terjebak dalam komplotan penyelundup emas. Kisah masa lalu yang penuh liku ini kemudian diceritakan kembali kepada anak-anak mereka di masa kini.

programme.title: Sang Pencerah

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Beda

programme.title: Wandering

programme.title: Mangkujiwo

programme.title: Hantu Juga Selfie
programme.desc: Helsi meninggal karena selfie, ia meneror temen-teman semasa hidupnya ketika mereka melakukan selfie. Hal ini membuat teman-temanya ketakutan, apa lagi bukan hanya sosok Helsi yang ada dalam foto namun hantu-hantu kocak lainya

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Harry's jealousy issues get the better of him when Frankie goes on a night out. The gang join forces to provide an entertaining birthday for Chloe. Plus, Tommy and Georgia find themselves on impromptu babysitting duty after popping in on Amy and Polly.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Bronwyn and Todd take the couples to Palm Springs to celebrate their tenth anniversary, but the divisions in the group become clear once they are in the desert and Heather makes her presence known even after being uninvited on the trip - as tensions between Lisa and Bronwyn boil over in the hot tub and result in Todd asking Lisa and John to leave early, trouble in paradise is suggested when Meredith gets upset after Seth prioritises work over their marriage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Shannon breaks down in La Quinta over an impending lawsuit with John as tension between Gina and Emily finally bubbles over on the pickleball court - meanwhile, the ladies in Big Bear bond over divorce before Alexis gets a call from John when they pack up to leave that sends her spiralling. After hearing that Shannon has changed, Tamra invites her to share a meal to see if there's any hope of moving forward.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Sports streaming engineer Marcus is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five women behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Marcus will only be having dinner with three of them. He will choose his dates based on the menus he most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will he want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Guz Khan, Angela Scanlon and Joel Corry join Stephen Mulhern for Celebrity Catchphrase, as they try to ‘say what they see’ and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win £50,000 for charity.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the game show. Contestants test their knowledge of blockbuster movies, pop stars, fitness and cooking.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's the end of an era - Dan Edgar's bachelor pad, scene of some of the most infamous afterparties in Essex, is closing its doors and being relaunched in a new guise. It's now Dan and Amber's flat, and she's wasted no time in adding some female flourishes - Dan's about to swap nights on the Xbox with Diags for couples' dinner parties, but before he does, he invites the lads over to say goodbye to the flat properly. Will the boys be able to hold it together during their final farewell, and is Dan really ready to let the curtains close on the best bachelor pad of all time? Harry's had an emotional time following his breakup with Frankie - after some serious introspection, he's finally beginning to understand how his jealousy issues impact on his relationships. When Lockie - who's had his own share of relationship dramas - sees how down he is, he pulls him aside for a heart-to-heart. Can he advise Harry on how to handle his emotions, and can Harry begin to move on from the heartbreak?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Forest ranger Felicity Ward is driving at night when she is blinded by a searing light from an unidentified flying object - the following morning sees her car found abandoned at the roadside. Barnaby is called to the crime scene where a black pod containing Felicity's body is discovered - meanwhile, the nearby village of Cooper Hill is buzzing with news of the UFO as hoteliers Victor and Nadine Campbell, their daughter Orla, tour operator Abigail Tonev and her garage-owning son Nathan rely on a stream of ufologists for their businesses. Barnaby and Nelson visit Felicity's mother Valerie and fiance Brogan and they reveal that Felicity was going to confront ufologist Carter Faulkner about an illegal campsite - as they dig deeper, Barnaby and Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals, and long-buried secrets of a terrestrial nature in their search for the truth.

programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. When respected surgeon Dan Marsden is shot dead days before his retirement and his teenage daughters Mira and Karen are abducted, DCI Vera Stanhope, DS Joe Ashworth and DC Kenny Lockhart must race against time to track down the killer and save the sisters. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting outside the Old Bailey leaves one police officer dead and another wounded in what seems to be a targeted attack on a witness giving evidence in an attempted murder trial. However, as Ronnie and the team investigate, they are surprised to learn that the gunman was specifically targeting police officers because he believes that his family were the victims of a police cover-up. The case is a taxing one and leaves the whole team emotionally spent. Things get tougher when defence barrister Doug Greer argues that his client was the victim of institutional racism. Have the detectives gone too far in their mission to bring a cop-killer to justice? The trial is at risk of being derailed because of a failure to separate the personal from the professional - can senior crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha manage to convince the jury that the defendant is a murderer rather than a victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a robbery goes wrong, an innocent have-a-go hero is shot dead and the two thieves take a cab driver hostage as they make their getaway. The police manage to capture one of the suspects, Frank Donovan, and they are desperate to find out the whereabouts of his hostage, who has a potentially fatal medical condition. Donovan realises that his knowledge gives him leverage, and he offers the team a deal - he will tell them where the cab driver is in return for an immunity agreement. Ronnie and Sam have just ten hours to find the hostage before the CPS is forced to agree to Donovan's terms. Donovan's lawyer, the uncompromising Miriam Pescatore, drives a hard bargain and, with no physical evidence to connect Donovan to the crime scene, must Jake and Alesha watch a self-confessed killer walk free?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Challis Court appears to be a serene retirement community for former police officers, but decades-old resentments still fester beneath the surface. When a resident is found murdered inside the gated estate, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter realise the killer is likely one of their own - an ex-cop. To crack the case, the duo must reopen the files on the legendary Goldman-Forbes heist from 30 years ago, a robbery that ruined reputations and left a long shadow. With several officers from the original investigation now living at Challis, Barnaby discovers that £300,000 remains motive enough for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a petty criminal makes a deathbed confession about murdering a teenage girl, DS Ronnie Brooks has to re-open a 14-year-old case he was involved in during his drinking days. Now sober, Ronnie is shaken to the core when he has to revisit the case, which he thought he had put to bed a long time ago - not least when he is forced to question the conclusions he drew when his mind was clouded by alcohol. Did he make a serious error when he accused the girl's businessman father of her murder, or are the team wrong to believe the dying words of a drug addict? Ronnie finds himself torn between his former partner's unwavering belief that they got the right man and the mounting doubts of his current colleagues. He also begins to wonder if there may be other ghosts from his past addiction coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team starts to investigate after an elderly janitor is found murdered in his home, but the crime has been carried out with such precision and planning that the only evidence the killer leaves is designed to lead the detectives down a series of false trails. Could such masterminding be the work of someone not in control of their own actions? The defence argues that it could - but an altogether more sinister truth is uncovered by prosecutors Jake and Alesha.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Brandon Monkford proudly introduces artist Lance Auden at the launch of his new sculpture park - the guests head into the floodlit woods and Clemmy Staples is spooked by her boyfriend Brin Dunne before discovering Brandon's body arranged on Lance's centrepiece sculpture. Kam finds a broken locket near the body at the murder scene before Barnaby speaks with the family - Brandon's wife Alexandra is shocked, but son Fabian explains that the villagers were opposed to the park and that Brin had formed a group called VASP (Villagers Against the Sculpture Park). After the family deny recognising the locket, Lance claims he got on well with Brandon but fellow artist Simeon Rowling suggests that Brandon upset some artists and critic Daniel Fargo reveals Brandon received hate mail. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they have to get creative if they are to crack a case where art imitates death and everything has a deeper meaning.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chas makes an effort to bond with her son after the youngster is arrested for possession of drugs. Donna asks Ross to be patient as she tries to end her relationship with Marlon.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jasmine tells Shane she plans to keep investigating the MacFarlanes. Chas enlists Donna's help in looking for her son Aaron - leaving Marlon worried about his wife's safety.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rosie is dragged back to the room by her frantic captor, who plants her purse in a dingy pub for someone to find. An emotionally overwrought Carla tells Tony the wedding is off.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Carla breaks down at Liam's funeral and has to leave the church, while Sally is forced to miss the service altogether because the police have new information about Rosie.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope and Sergeant Joe Ashworth investigate a fatal stabbing outside a busy Newcastle nightclub - identifying the victim as former Metropolitan Police officer John Warnock, the only clues are an empty flat and an unregistered car with 6000 pounds hidden in the boot. To solve the case, Vera must ultimately retrace Warnock's final steps to uncover the truth behind a web of lies spanning 25 years.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An enquiry is launched when the shocking murder of a teenage girl is shown in an online video. Despite the grainy footage and the lack of a body, the girl and her attackers are identified. But a vow of silence between the defendants and no further evidence means that Jake and Alesha struggle to assemble a strong case. One key witness could turn that all around - but not without the most personal of sacrifices.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: On one long gruelling day, the team work flat-out on three separate cases. The day starts early for Ronnie and Sam as they are called to a murder scene in the early hours. Later, they take a 999 call when a sibling dispute turns murderous. Then a frantic morning takes another turn when an allegation of police intimidation is made against one of the team. The day is no less busy in court for crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha. Their case goes in an unexpected direction when a defendant claims to have made a false confession while under pressure from a police officer. The team have until the end of the day to prove the allegation is untrue.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: First in a two-part story ending the long-running series. When DI Frost joins forces with RSPCA inspector Christine Moorhead in a raid on a brutal dogfight, there are unexpected and deadly consequences - a boy is killed in a knife attack and the killer's father will go to any lengths to stop Christine, the only witness to the crime, from testifying against his son.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: The very first episode of the classic detective series. New York police lieutenant James Dempsey kills his corrupt partner Joey and has to lay low until the case can be further investigated - his superior O'Grady sends Dempsey to London in England as part of an exchange of officers. Chief Superintendent Spikings, the head of SI-10, is not too pleased to have a Yank forced onto his department, so he decides to couple Dempsey with his complete opposite in the form of Sergeant Harriet 'Harry' Makepeace - an upper-class English rose - on a case involving a mysterious shipment of caviar.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken's diplomatic skills are put to the test when two brothers inherit equal shares in a classic car and the parents of a university student studying art.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series set in the world of salvage. When Danielle accompanies Mike on a pick while Frank looks after the shop, the first-time picker strikes gold when she spots a derelict hotel filled with treasure.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora begin a bucket list fishing tour of Britain in Shropshire - their first mission is to catch a specimen crucian of over two pounds before they head to a top syndicate water called The Avenue, where the carp can weigh over an incredible 60 pounds. As they set themselves the crazy mission of both beating their current UK carp personal bests (PBs), Ali also calls in a favour from two Michelin-starred chef and carp angler Daniel Clifford to teach Zamo how to cook on the bank to stop him moaning...

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Can a celebrity take on and defeat the greatest quiz team in the world? Bradley Walsh hosts as comedian Russell Kane, This Morning's Dr Zoe Williams, broadcaster Kaye Adams, journalist and presenter Matt Allwright and writer and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth take on the Chasers in a bid to win big money for their chosen charities.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff hosts the classic darts-based game show as he is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is Queen of the Palace Fallon Sherrock, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.

programme.title: The Nanny Sees All
programme.desc: From 2025. In an attempt to overcome her writer's block, Grace takes a job as a nanny to look after Andy, the mayor's son. But her life is soon in danger when the two previous nannies are found dead.

programme.title: Genie
programme.desc: From 2023. With his job, life and family disintegrating around him, Bernard dusts off a jewelery box and inadvertently releases the spirit Flora, who may be able to help him.

programme.title: The Rebellious Life of Mrs. Rosa Parks
programme.desc: From 2022. Based on the biography of Jeanne Theoharis, the documentary provides an insight into the life of the famous civil rights icon and reveals the real story of her rebellious activism in the fight against racial discrimination and injustice.

programme.title: Chosen Family
programme.desc: From 2024. Ann can't escape her family, her dating life, and her inability to say no, which means she's constantly trying to fix everyone else's problems. But can she finally put herself first when a new love enters her life?

programme.title: Please Don't Destroy: The Treasure of Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: Set in 2023. Three childhood friends turned inept colleagues battle hairless bears, desperate park rangers and a hypocritical cult leader in hopes of finding a priceless treasure, only to discover that finding the treasure is the easy part.

programme.title: Ann Rule: Danger in the Dorm
programme.desc: From 2024. Childhood friends Becky and Kathleen start college together, but the bond between them begins to unravel as soon as they get there. After Becky is tragically killed, Kathleen is wracked with guilt and fear as more attacks take place.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love
programme.desc: From 2024. Nicholas and Isabel have lived different lives, but something has always drawn them towards each other. Only as adults do they meet - without realizing how long their destinies have already been intertwined.

programme.title: Inheritance
programme.desc: From 2025. When Maya learns that her father was once a spy, she suddenly finds herself at the center of an international conspiracy.

programme.title: Woman of the Hour
programme.desc: From 2024. The true story of Rodney Alcala, a psychopathic serial killer, who lured women by pretending to be a photographer looking for models.

programme.title: Distant
programme.desc: Set in 2024. Asteroid miner Andy Ramirez must traverse the harsh terrain of an alien planet to find the only other known survivor, a woman trapped in her own escape pod.

programme.title: One of Them Days
programme.desc: From 2025. Dreux and Alyssa's friendship is put to the test as they struggle to find a way to avoid eviction.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: From 2023. After inheriting his father's hotel chain, Hal attempts to end his secret relationship with dominatrix Rebecca. Over the course of a nerve-wracking night, both fight to keep the upper hand, while the balance of power swings wildly back and forth.

programme.title: Goodrich
programme.desc: From 2024. Art dealer Andy Goodrich's life changes when his young wife begins a 90-day rehab program and at the same time threatens him with divorce.

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: From 2016. David Ghantt is a wealthy guy who works for a money transport company and is about to marry the crazy Jandice, and he dreams of a more exciting life. So when his beautiful colleague Kelly suggests they rob their employer, he agrees

programme.title: Stronger
programme.desc: From 2017. The inspiring and true story of Jeff Bauman, an ordinary 27-year-old man, who became a symbol of hope after the horrific bombing during the Boston Marathon in 2013.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: From 2019. The true story of a British whistleblower who leaked information to the media about an illegal NSA operation, the purpose of which was to pressure the UN Security Council to approve the invasion of Iraq in 2003.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: From 2004. Ambitious but down-on-his-luck FBI agents Marcus and Kevin are hanging on by a tightrope at work and must go undercover as two blonde diva sisters to keep their jobs.

programme.title: My Blueberry Nights
programme.desc: From 2007. Elizabeth, a disillusioned young woman, embarks on a journey of self-examination to overcome a major heartbreak.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: From 1982. A lost little extraterrestrial creature, three million light years from home. A lonely ten-year-old boy who takes him home. Two lives that are changed by a timeless experience and a friendship without earthly boundaries.

programme.title: Bombshell
programme.desc: From 2019. Inspired by the true scandal of the women who brought down the man who created the most powerful and controversial media empire of all time, Fox News.

programme.title: Haisommer
programme.desc: From 1975. On an idyllic beach during the high season, a shark attacks and kills several of the bathers. Three men start a hunt to neutralize the murderous shark.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: From 2024. In this comedy, we follow Jamie, a liberated and free-spirited soul who has just broken up with yet another lover, and her rigid friend Marian, who desperately needs to let go.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: From 2024. The brutal origin story of Marvel's iconic villain Kraven, a man with a complex relationship with his ruthless father, who becomes the world's greatest hunter.

programme.title: The taste of hunger
programme.desc: From 2021. Married couple Maggie and Carsten open the restaurant Malus. Their common dream is the famous Michelin star. But one day Carsten receives a letter that his wife loves someone else.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: From 1980. When Jake Blues gets out of prison, he and his brother, Elwood, set out to visit the orphanage where they grew up and were raised by nuns.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: From 2004. Ambitious but down-on-his-luck FBI agents Marcus and Kevin are hanging on by a tightrope at work and must go undercover as two blonde diva sisters to keep their jobs.

programme.title: My Blueberry Nights
programme.desc: From 2007. Elizabeth, a disillusioned young woman, embarks on a journey of self-examination to overcome a major heartbreak.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: From 2018. Tony Lip is hired to drive Dr. Don Shirley, a world-class black pianist, on a concert tour from Manhattan to the southern states. On the trip, they experience racism, but also humanity and humour.

programme.title: A Dog's Journey
programme.desc: From 2019. Bailey is back! This time, the lovable dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the people he meets.

programme.title: After
programme.desc: From 2019. Tessa Young has always planned her life far ahead, but then she meets a gruff boy named Hardin, with too many tattoos and piercings, and he crushes all her plans.

programme.title: Long Shot
programme.desc: From 2019. Fred Flarsky is a journalist "who has taken a little break", but during the reunion with his first crush, Charlotte Field, he charms her.

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: From 2020. A disabled young woman who is homeschooled begins to suspect that the treatments she receives from her mother may not be what they seem - and that her mother is hiding a dark secret from her.

programme.title: The queen
programme.desc: From 2019. Anne is a successful lawyer and happily married to doctor Peter. But when she seduces her 17-year-old stepson Gustav, she puts everything on the line. Note: The film contains explicit sex scenes.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: From 2022. When health and lifestyle journalist Ariel Moss spots a man she thinks is the man of her dreams at a local restaurant, she will do everything to get to know him better.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: From 2017. A girl grew up with an unconventional artist mother and alcoholic father. When she moves to New York as an adult, her parents accuse her of betraying the values ​​they taught her as a child.

programme.title: After We Collided
programme.desc: From 2020. In this sequel, based on the worldwide bestseller After, we follow Tessa in her painful breakup and the time afterwards. Will love overcome the past?

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: From 2019. After a mysterious blackout, Jack discovers that he is the only one in the world who remembers The Beatles! He becomes famous in record time by presenting the quartet's songs as his own.

programme.title: The Marco effect
programme.desc: From 2021. Murder-for-hire and fraud in the millions come to light when the policeman Carl Mørck and Department Q begin to dig into a dropped criminal case about the wanted pedophile-accused civil servant William Stark.

programme.title: Midsummer
programme.desc: From 2019. A young woman from New York joins her boyfriend and his friends on vacation to Sweden, to visit an exchange student and celebrate midsummer. But the idyllic celebration soon takes a terrifying turn.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: From 2024. To get ready for the last fight of his career, a boxer is helped by an unscrupulous trainer who runs a grueling weight loss program.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Pascal Kapp's rallies are different from all other classic car rallies. These include the Upper Bavarian Master Classic, the Saxon Master Classic, the 10 Lakes Rally and, last but not least, the one-day rally 333 minute rally, which - as the name suggests - has to be driven in exactly 333 minutes. A day full of driving fun for the participants with a wide variety of special tests guarantees the best entertainment for the top speed spectators in this episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Fine tuning of superlatives – the Mansory Conquistador. A car for 750,000 euros. Pure power and no trace of understatement. With the Mercedes CLK DTM AMG the road becomes a race track. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Classic motorcycles are back in fashion. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies. Nostalgic spoke wheels complete the design of the elegant four-cylinder bike with sufficient 94 hp power, more than enough for a relaxed cruise into the sunset. How does the CB 1100 EX compare to rivals like the BMW R nineT? The Japanese classic in the MOTORVISION TV driving test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Children's of Alabama Indy GP, Barber Motorsports Park, Alabama

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: More and more traffic, tight delivery schedules and a constant flood of information – professional drivers don't have it easy. At the same time, modern trucks offer new digital features that make driving safer and more efficient. MOTORVISION visits the traditional Swedish manufacturer Volvo Trucks, watches the development of new automation systems and goes on a journey with the digital giants. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world of classic automobiles is colorful and diverse. Crass rally cars from the eighties with a lot of noise, cute little cars to kiss and big chrome sleds from America with big V8 engines and lots of torque. In "Best of Classic Ride" we once again present you the most beautiful stories from the past broadcasts. (Channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today we are at the DTM show event in Munich in the Olympiahalle. A mega event and battle between the Audi and Mercedes brands. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Our mechanic guys also urgently need help - the lowrider star is still hanging around tired on the tow truck, even though he's about to dance. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a racetrack icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: Grand Prix of Ilse de la Reunion, Clermont-Fernand
programme.desc: The X-Trial World Championship is an indoor motorcycle series in which riders must overcome obstacles on the track (channel info).

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. Our day tours led to the famous Dikti Mountains. This film also shows the Lasithi plateau, the famous Vai Beach and a tour to the former hippie village and the caves of Matala. The highlight is the ride up to the mountain village of Ethia on what is probably one of the most spectacular (station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Tenerife is not just a paradise for pensioners and winter refugees. The island also attracts adventurers who want to explore breathtaking landscapes on winding roads on their motorcycles. M-Motorradreisen has now included the unique natural backdrop with the omnipresent, 3715m high Teide, lush forests and deep blue oceans in its program for the second time. This travel documentary shows the most beautiful tours on the two Canary Islands. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sweden road trip with the VW ID.7 Tour
programme.desc: Long distances and electric cars have not been friends so far. But that should change, for example with this vehicle: The VW ID.7 in the Pro S version offers a range of around 700 km and, as a tourer, also plenty of space - the perfect companion for a road trip. We drive through Sweden in the electric station wagon and check consumption, driving characteristics and comfort. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: These four-wheelers can handle everything from sand to water to difficult terrain. Even on a week-long expedition through the most remote places, they don't give up. We check what's behind the new Land Rover Defender Trophy and test the special model. We also reveal 5 exciting facts about the Ineos Grenadier. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today we are at the DTM show event in Munich in the Olympiahalle. A mega event and battle between the Audi and Mercedes brands. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Our mechanic guys also urgently need help - the lowrider star is still hanging around tired on the tow truck, even though he's about to dance. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this Top Speed ​​episode, presenter Martin Utberg is invited by the art expert Detlev Kümmel, known from the popular TV show Bares for Rares. programme.title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The Range Rover Velar – The vehicle is a milestone for the traditional British company Land Rover. It takes the mid-size SUV segment to a whole new level of luxury. Extendable door handles and laser lights are just two of the many technical highlights. MOTORVISION TV accompanies the creation of the Velar and shows English craftsmanship paired with modern mass production. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Autonomous driving, the Internet of Things or artificial intelligence – technology makes it possible, but most people are afraid and anxious. In the future, will we all be slaves to technology and dependent on machines that can do everything themselves and perhaps even better than us? No fear! Part four of Grüne Welle gets you ready for the mobile future and gives you in-depth insights into the technology of tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether it's the Porsche 918 Spyder, Audi R8, Mercedes AMG GT or BMW i8, they are the fastest, most spectacular and most sought-after supercars in the world, with breathtaking speeds and incredible engine performance: German supercars not only lead the way because of their unique performance, but also set standards with their design and innovative technology. DreamCars presents the most exciting and fastest German super sports cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Two different horses from the same stable: Ford Consul Coupe and Mercury Cougar. Which of the two classic coupes is more fascinating, the Teutonic Consul or the Big Banger Cougar? Also: The legends return – The Silver Arrows at the Großglockner Grand Prix. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Auto Union – The story of the four rings
programme.desc: It is the second largest German car manufacturer before the war, Auto Union. In 1932, the economic crisis brought the Horch, DKW, Audi and Wanderer brands together to form Auto Union. Car History tells the whole story of Auto Union, its four brands, the exciting cars and the big Grand Prix victories of the spectacular Silver Arrows in the 1930s. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Crash or be crashed, that is the big question at the stock car race in Herzfelde! It doesn't take much to catapult your competitors out of the race. Take a vehicle that is ready for scrap, remove the glass, small parts, back seat and passenger seat. Airbags are undesirable. A crash helmet, seat belt and roll bar are completely sufficient here. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: A boat with four wheels: a floating float! There are still some examples of them around and we have found the most beautiful ones for you! (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and a car radio are not enough for this event. Performance and pressure are what count in Sinsheim. Only here at the Car and Sound trade fair does the sound level become an experience. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: How do stunts work? What exactly does a stuntman do? Who are the real heroes of action films? The unique series “Stunt Heroes” on MotorvisionTV has been answering these and other questions for two years. The stunt people from Action Concept, one of the largest film and stunt productions in Europe, give a unique insight into their daily work and into what cannot be seen in the film. Weeks of preparation are often necessary for a 5-second film stunt. Backbreaking work! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Martin Utberg visits the artist Andrew McGeachy in Thun, where he portrays an Alfa Romeo Montréal. In front of Schadau Castle, the viewer learns everything about the design and history of this iconic sports car. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: We test various tricycles for big boys: First, trikes with up to 200 hp car engines in the rear and the three-wheeled MP3 scooter from Piaggio, which has more grip than any other scooter with two front tires. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: The Thomathal on the Katschberg in Austria - there is still calm here in the morning. The sun is shining, the ice is glittering. But the calm is over as soon as Danny Pfeil's European Speedclub begins winter driving training. Every January, an ordinary meadow is transformed into a treacherous course of ice and snow. Everyone can push their limits here for three weeks a year. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The new Bentley Continental GT. It is the successful model of the English luxury brand. Nevertheless, the British have been making losses in recent years. The new car must be a success in order to return Bentley to its former strength. This makes the development of the new Continental a particularly large, mammoth task. Made in England shows the development of the new GT and whether the luxury athlete also convinces racing legend Derek Bell. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the classic coupes, the English sports cars, cars as cool as James Bond. Aston Martin, Bentley and Jaguar build the most exclusive and elegant coupes in the world. Their inimitable design is still inspired today by the iconic Jaguar E-Type and Aston Martin DB5. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and expensive English coupes. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He has a famous name and should heat up the Ferraris on the race track. The Bizzarrini GT 5300 from 1965. Giotto Bizzarrini, the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, wanted to use this car to return the favor to his former employer Enzo Ferrari, because the employment relationship ended in a dispute. But the Italian super sports car with the American V8 heart failed spectacularly. Today, however, the Bizzarrini 5300 GT is a sought-after collector's item and is often more expensive than a Ferrari. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Mercedes – The comeback of the Silver Arrows
programme.desc: Whether gullwing, streamlined or monoposto – after the war, silver quickly became the color of the winners again. In the slipstream of their own myth, the second generation Silver Arrows also drive from victory to victory and give Mercedes golden years in racing. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Miriam Höller visits hot events and cool challenges in the motor world for Motorvision TV. In the first episode she reports on the "Night of the Jumps" in the Munich Olympic Hall. The event is part of the Night of the Jumps Tour, the official FIM World Motocross Championship. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One of the top topics in this episode of Perfect Ride: topless models. With them, every adventure starts with a thrill: Spyder, Speedster, Roadster – in short: convertibles. Free driving and feeling of life in all variations (channel information).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes – there are 1000 ways to destroy cars. They all know the Stunt Heroes! The report looks back at the car highlights of the last few months. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top speed presenter Martin Utberg and his teammate Jonas Lach are taking part in the Planai Classic, one of the few remaining real winter rallies in Europe. You start with an Austin Seven from 1932. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: GP of Qatar, Ski Division, Old Doha Port

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: The Monaco Grand Prix was neither the first Grand Prix in motorsport history nor the first race to be held on a road circuit. Nevertheless, the event has achieved cult status since its premiere in 1929. No race is as intertwined with racing history as the Monaco Grand Prix. MOTORVISION TV tells the story of this legendary race. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Today in Classic Races we are showing what is probably the best description and representation of the four-wheel drive system newly developed by Audi from 1980 onwards. With fascinating and exciting images from various rallies, legendary drivers and great scenes from the rally world. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).
